text:
Port 5000 is in use—stop any existing backend process first.

To test:
1. Start backend: `cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python app.py`
2. In another terminal: `cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && timeout 10 python tuya_integration.py`

Check voltage/current in backend logs or API: `curl http://localhost:5000/api/electricity/history?limit=5`

It should show ~240V voltage and 0 power/current since no load.
